x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA conversation volume and containment rate measure self-service effectiveness. Now Assist AI improves with more conversation data.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Drive VA adoption through promotion and channel expansion. Track metrics via VA Analytics dashboard. Target: 1,000+ conversations and 60%+ containment rate for optimal Now Assist VA impact.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c4f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[VA conversation volume and containment rate measure self-service effectiveness. Now Assist AI improves with more conversation data.]]></ai_justification><check_name>VA Conversation Volume and Containment</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No VA conversations in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No VA conversations found in the last 90 days. Conversation volume and containment cannot be assessed — drive VA adoption before enabling Now Assist.'
        };
    }

    var gaContained = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaContained.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaContained.addQuery('state', 'complete');
    gaContained.addQuery('agent_transfer_at', '');
    gaContained.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaContained.query();
    var contained = gaContained.next() ? parseInt(gaContained.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((contained / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = total + ' conversations (last 90 days) | ' + pct + '% contained without agent transfer';

    if (total >= 1000 && pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' conversations with ' + pct + '% containment rate (last 90 days). Now Assist VA has a solid self-service foundation to build on.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 200 || pct >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' conversations with ' + pct + '% containment (last 90 days). Targets: 1,000+ conversations, 40%+ containment. Drive VA adoption and improve topic fulfillment before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low VA usage (' + total + ' conversations, ' + pct + '% containment in last 90 days). Now Assist VA AI improvements require an established VA user base and conversation history to be effective.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module><number>CHK0000506</number><order>60</order><remediation_guidance>Drive VA adoption through promotion and channel expansion. Track metrics via VA Analytics dashboard. Target: 1,000+ conversations and 60%+ containment rate for optimal Now Assist VA impact.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c4f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>VA Conversation Volume and Containment</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c4f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
